grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Item merchandise value plus item freight charge.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Order-level item count repeated at item grain.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Distinct product count for the order, repeated at item grain.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Distinct seller count for the order, repeated at item grain.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Order-level merchandise value repeated at item grain; do not sum without deduplicating orders.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Order-level freight value repeated at item grain; do not sum without deduplicating orders.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Order merchandise plus freight summed from item rows.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Order-level payment value repeated at item grain; do not sum without deduplicating orders.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Payment type from the highest-value payment row; sequence breaks ties.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Largest installment count across the order payment rows.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Mean review score for the order or aggregate grain.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Score from the review row with the latest answer timestamp.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Days from purchase to actual customer delivery.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Signed actual-delivery minus estimated-delivery difference in days; positive means late.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: 1 when actual delivery occurred after the estimated delivery timestamp.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: 1 when carrier handoff precedes purchase or delivery precedes carrier handoff.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: Order payment value minus item merchandise-plus-freight total.

grain: One row per order item with joined customer, seller, product, order, payment, and review context.
definition: 1 when the absolute payment reconciliation difference is at most 0.02.
